channel.title: Talks & Publications on Ryan Baker
channel.description: Recent content in Talks & Publications on Ryan Baker

item.title: Context Synchronization for Multi-Agent Workflows
item.description: A shared context layer for multi-agent coding workflows that tracks symbol-level observations and reports stale context when concurrent edits invalidate agent assumptions.

item.title: Messing with Floating Point
item.description: A deep dive into IEEE 754 floating point, its quirks, and how to work with it effectively in C++
